questions.question: Explain the differences between crawling, indexing, and searching in the context of web data retrieval. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of each step in the process

questions.question: A web search engine uses a ranking algorithm that assigns a score to a web page based on its relevance to a search query. What are some key factors that a search engine might consider when determining a page's relevance? (10 marks)
Describe the role of metadata in web data retrieval. How does metadata support the retrieval of relevant web pages for a given search query? (12 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the importance of metadata in facilitating web retrieval
